description:
The image depicts a cozy living room setting with a modern touch. The focal point is a large flat-screen TV mounted on a pristine white wall. The TV screen displays an abstract image of a city at night, painted in hues of blue and red, adding a vibrant contrast to the otherwise minimalist decor.

Below the TV, there's a charming white fireplace that houses a black firewood basket, ready for a warm fire on a cold evening. To the left of the fireplace, a window draped with a black curtain lets in soft, ambient light that illuminates the room.

On the right side of the fireplace, there's a door leading to another part of the house. The overall atmosphere is one of comfort and elegance, a perfect blend of modern design and traditional warmth.
